nl_query: Show all configurations updated in the last 7 days.
failed_sql: SELECT c.id, c.config_key, c.config_value, c.data_type, c.scope_type, c.scope_id, c.description, c.version, c.updated_by, c.updated_at FROM configuration c WHERE c.updated_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7 days' AND c.is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1000;
